text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On a very particular day for<n>auspicious wonders,
Matikanefukukitaru gains an<n>abundance of good
luck.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Believing this to be the grace of the<n>great Shiraoki,
she begins preparing<n>for the Twinkle Series.
